## Safety Checks

Please confirm:

- [ ] No API keys, secrets, private keys, wallet files, certificates, or `.env` contents are included in this issue.
- [ ] No full source files are pasted unless they are tiny public fixtures.

- [ ] The report does not ask for automatic code apply.
